tasks.label: Apercu web local
tasks.detail: Lance le frontend Vite sur le port 8080 pour un apercu local.

tasks.label: Apercu build GitHub Pages
tasks.command: GITHUB_ACTIONS=true npm run build --workspace vote-libre-main && npm run preview --workspace vote-libre-main -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173
tasks.detail: Construit puis sert la version utilisee par GitHub Pages sur le port 4173.

tasks.label: Flutter generer web
args: export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter create . --platforms=web
tasks.detail: Genere les fichiers plateforme Flutter Web autour du squelette existant.

tasks.label: Flutter apercu web
args: export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter run -d web-server --web-hostname 0.0.0.0 --web-port=8081 --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-}
tasks.detail: Lance le port Flutter Web local sur le port 8081.

tasks.label: Flutter build GitHub Pages
args: export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter build web --release --base-href /citoyen-peyi/ --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-}
tasks.detail: Construit la version Flutter Web de production pour GitHub Pages.

tasks.label: Git publier migration Flutter
args: cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && git add -A && git commit -m "feat: migrate app to Flutter web pages" && git push origin main
tasks.detail: Stage, commit puis pousse la migration Flutter vers main.
